escalation.rationale: US-Iran blockade standoff continues with Iran threatening Strait of Hormuz closure, IDF strikes in Lebanon during ceasefire, and Russia drawing Belarus into Ukraine conflict.

ticker_items: Iran warns Strait of Hormuz stays shut unless US lifts port blockade
IDF drone strike kills one in south Lebanon during truce
Zelensky warns Russia may draw Belarus into Ukraine war
Trump threatens Iran bombing resumption if no deal by Wednesday

new_entrant.text: Belarus potentially being drawn into the Ukraine conflict according to Zelensky's warnings.

eastern_europe.description: Ukrainian drone attack causes fire at Russian Baltic Sea port facility.
Russian strike leaves 380,000 users without power in northern Ukraine.

middle_east.description: IDF drone strike kills one person on first day of Israel-Lebanon ceasefire.
IDF drone strike kills one person on first day of ceasefire

claimed_totals.figure: 2,076 in Iran, 26 in Israel, 13 US soldiers, 28 in Gulf states

claimed_totals.claim: US-Israel attacks on Iran total deaths
US military deaths in Iran conflict

ukraine.text: Russia may draw Belarus into Ukraine war
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelensky
ukraine.title: President of Ukraine

middle_east.text: Iran says it fully reopened the Strait of Hormuz to commercial vessels but maritime movement will be strictly controlled by Tehran, with passage allowed only through designated routes and under Iranian approval.
middle_east.speaker: Iranian officials
middle_east.title: Government spokesperson

middle_east.text: Iran Cease-fire Ends if No Deal Reached by Wednesday, U.S. May 'Start Dropping Bombs Again'
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: American military forces are prepared to strike Iran's energy infrastructure, including power plants and oil refineries, if ongoing conflict resumes.
middle_east.speaker: Pete Hegseth
middle_east.title: US Secretary of War

middle_east.text: Control of the Strait of Hormuz will be strictly controlled by Tehran, passage allowed only through designated routes under Iranian approval
middle_east.speaker: Iran Joint Military Command
middle_east.title: Military Officials

observers.description: Leading coalition with UK to establish international mission for Strait of Hormuz navigation security. Mission deployment awaits end of Iran war. Positioning as diplomatic mediator while maintaining security interests.

Hosting global leaders in Beijing while US faces international criticism over Iran war. Accused of providing satellite intelligence to Iran for targeting US bases, which Beijing denies. Expanding diplomatic influence as alternative to US leadership.

Actively mediating US-Iran negotiations after initial Islamabad talks failed. Set to host resumed talks between Washington and Tehran in coming days. Playing crucial role in preventing conflict escalation.
Ukraine's Zelensky warns that Russia may draw Belarus into the Ukraine war, potentially expanding the conflict. This represents a significant escalation risk for the eastern European theater.

financial.notes: Brent crude fell from above $98 to $88 after Iran announced Strait of Hormuz 'open' during ceasefire before reimposing restrictions.
